case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. MAYFIELD, RAVINA C., AKA RAVINA MAYFIELD et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MAYFIELD, RAVINA C., AKA RAVINA MAYFIELD DOES I-X SUMMONS ISSUED

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR JUDGMENT FOR POSSESSION, BACK RENTS & LEASE FORFEITURE, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAYFIELD, RAVINA C., AKA RAVINA MAYFIELD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1104 PALOU AVE, SF $253.50 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $253.50, LEASE FORFEITED
